free_text: Parity violation in neutron resonances in 107,109Ag
#doi:10.1103/PhysRevC.56.90
Resonance parameter data 13687 superseded.
Experimental
setup.
LANSCE.
Gelina pulsed neutron source.
YH
Updated to new reference. Data replaced.
BP: Updated entry, added doi. Deleted
subentries 2-3, 8-9 (unobtainable data) per an NRDC
decision for data sets that were published before 2000
(C32 of WP2022-01). Digitization of flat uncalibrated
transmission curves without target thicknesses is not
viable option.
New resonances were assigned by comparing capture
spectra for natural silver and enriched 107Ag.
Neutron width determined by area analysis of
transmission data. Spins and parity determined from
analysis of capture data (IRMM data below 495 eV;
lanl data at higher energies) using low-level
population method. Bayesian method was used to
determine orbital angular momentum.
No information on source uncertainties.
Table I, page 1125 of J,PR/C,59,1119,1999.
Table II, page 95 of J,PR/C,56,90,1997. Data up to
494.9 eV taken from Table I of main reference.
Remaining data from earlier reference.

S-wave spacings determined from linear fits to
cumulative number of levels up to 700 eV. p-wave
spacing derived from S-wave spacings.
No information on source of uncertainties.
